onboardingWalletExplanation.slide1.subti.message: Add digital cards with your information, and  share them easily with others. It’s like having your wallet on your phone.
comments: Subtitle for first slide of wallet onboarding
onboardingWalletExplanation.slide1.subti.translation: Lisää digitaalisia kortteja tiedoillasi ja jaa niitä helposti muiden kanssa. Se on kuin lompakko puhelimessasi.

onboardingWalletExplanation.slide3.subti.message: Add your cards and documents by scanning QR codes. When organizations request your data, you can review and share with a tap in the app. Your information is always secure with your PIN or fingerprint.
comments: Subtitle for third slide of wallet onboarding
onboardingWalletExplanation.slide3.subti.translation: Lisää korttisi ja asiakirjasi skannaamalla QR-koodeja. Kun organisaatiot pyytävät tietojasi, voit tarkistaa ja jakaa ne yhdellä napautuksella sovelluksessa. Tietosi ovat aina turvassa PIN-koodisi tai sormenjälkesi avulla.

onboardingWalletExplanation.slide2.subti.message: The digital wallet stores your important information all in one place on your phone. It’s a secure and easy way to carry everything you need without using a physical wallet.

onboardingWalletExplanation.slide2.subti.translation: Digitaalinen lompakko tallentaa tärkeät tietosi yhteen paikkaan puhelimeesi. Se on turvallinen ja helppo tapa pitää tarvitsemasi tiedot mukana ilman fyysistä lompakkoa.

comments: Shown after a failed digital signature
Shown after a successful digital signature

cardLifecycle.limitedByDate.expired.desc.message: The expiration date of this card has passed

cardLifecycle.limitedByDate.expired.shee.message: The expiration date of this card has passed on {0}.

requestedAttributes.onlySatisfiedDescrip.message: The following cards will be shared.

signShare.documentIntro.message: The following document will be signed.
comments: Text above the document to be signed

signShare.cardIntro.message: The following personal information will be used to sign the document.

deferredCredentials.cardNotAvailableYetD.message: The issuer has not yet made the card available. Please check again later.
comments: Description of the info box explaining the card is pending
deferredCredentials.cardNotAvailableYetD.translation: Myöntäjä ei ole vielä tehnyt korttia saataville. Yritä myöhemmin uudelleen.

cardLifecycle.revoked.sheetDescription.message: The issuer has revoked this card and it can not be used anymore. Contact the issuer for more information.
cardLifecycle.revoked.sheetDescription.translation: Myöntäjä on peruuttanut tämän kortin eikä sitä voi enää käyttää. Ota yhteyttä myöntäjään saadaksesi lisätietoja.

deferredCredentials.cardNotAvailableYetW.message: The issuer of the card indicated you should check again at {0}.
comments: Description of the info box explaining the card is pending with expected time
deferredCredentials.cardNotAvailableYetW.translation: Kortin myöntäjä ehdottaa, että tarkistat uudelleen kello {0}.

deferredCredentials.cardNotAvailableYetW.message: The issuer of the card indicated you should check again on {0}.

0:
i18n.date(nextCheck, {
                        year: 'numeric',
                        month: 'long',
                        day: 'numeric',
                        hour: 'numeric',
                        minute: 'numeric',
                      })

comments: Description of the info box explaining the card is pending with expected date
deferredCredentials.cardNotAvailableYetW.translation: Kortin myöntäjä ehdottaa, että tarkistat uudelleen {0}.

comments: Label shown above optional extra description

mdlFlow.sourceUnavailable.message: The license registry is not reachable right now. Try again later.
mdlFlow.sourceUnavailable.translation: Ajokorttirekisteri ei ole juuri nyt tavoitettavissa. Yritä myöhemmin uudelleen.

trust.noApprovals.message: The organisation has not been verified and is NOT part of the ZADA Trust Registry
comments: A message shown when there are no organizations that approved the current party

requestPurpose.overaskingWarning.message: The purpose given does not match the data requested.
comments: Warning shown when the declared purpose does not align with the data requested by the organization
requestPurpose.overaskingWarning.translation: Ilmoitettu tarkoitus ei vastaa pyydettyjä tietoja.

cardLifecycle.limitedByDate.validityPeri.message: The validity period of this card is from {0} until {1}.

trust.noApprovalsWithoutOrganizationName.message: There are no organizations that have approved this unknown organization.
comments: A message shown when there are no organizations that approved the current party, but the organization name is not known
trust.noApprovalsWithoutOrganizationName.translation: Mikään organisaatio ei luota tähän toimijaan.

comments: Shown when the user has no activity items yet

onboardingIdCardRequestedAttributes.desc.message: These {0} attributes will be read from your eID card.
comments: Text explaining how many attributes will be read from the eID card

passportScan.keyFieldsLabel.message: These three fields unlock the passport chip.
comments: Label explaining these three fields unlock the chip
passportScan.keyFieldsLabel.translation: Nämä kolme kenttää avaavat passin sirun.

qrScanner.permissionDescription.message: This allows the app to scan QR codes that include credentials or data requests.
comments: Description explaining why camera permission is needed
qrScanner.permissionDescription.translation: Kameraa tarvitaan todistetarjousten ja tietopyyntöjen QR-koodien skannaukseen.

offlineQr.allowBluetoothAccessDescriptio.message: This allows the app to share with a QR code.

funkeWallet.about.description.message: This app was created by Animo Solutions in the context of the SPRIN-D Funke ‘EUDI Wallet Prototypes’. It serves as a prototype for future wallet providers. All code is available under Apache 2.0.
comments: About screen description text for the Funke wallet
funkeWallet.about.description.translation: Tämän sovelluksen on luonut Animo Solutions SPRIN-D Funke 'EUDI Wallet Prototypes' -hankkeen yhteydessä. Se toimii prototyyppinä tuleville lompakkopalveluntarjoajille. Kaikki koodi on saatavilla Apache 2.0 -lisenssillä.

cardLifecycle.batch.sheetDescription.message: This card requires periodic validation using an internet connection. When usage is low you will be notified.
cardLifecycle.batch.sheetDescription.translation: Tämä kortti vaatii säännöllistä vahvistusta Internet-yhteydellä. Kun käyttö on vähäistä, saat ilmoituksen.

cardLifecycle.limitedByDate.activeIn.message: This card will be active in {activeDaysString}, on {0}.

common.featureNotSupported.message: This feature is not supported in this version of the app.
comments: Shown when a feature that is not supported is accessed
common.featureNotSupported.translation: Ominaisuus ei toimi tässä sovelluksen versiossa.

comments: Title shown for offline message

pidSetup.idCardPin.subtitle.message: This is required to read data from your card.

migrationWelcome.body.message: This is your new ZADA ID app for managing digital credentials from different issuers. To get started, verify your phone number to bring over your existing credentials — or skip if this is your first time with ZADA.
comments: Body text of the first-launch welcome sheet
Title for first slide of wallet onboarding
Heading shown on empty wallet screen

credentials.cold.untrusted.message: This issuer isn’t recognised for offline copies yet.
credentials.cold.untrusted.translation: Tätä myöntäjää ei vielä tunnisteta offline-kopioita varten.

passportScan.permissionDescription.message: This lets the app read the printed code at the bottom of your passport.
comments: Why camera is needed for passport scan
passportScan.permissionDescription.translation: Tämän avulla sovellus voi lukea passisi alareunaan painetun koodin.

mdlFlow.urlNotAllowed.message: This link is not recognized as an official license page.

requestPurpose.infoSheet.description.message: This organization seems to be asking for different or more data than their purpose suggests. Read the request carefully. You can deny the request if you do not agree with the data asked.
comments: Description text in the overasking info sheet
requestPurpose.infoSheet.description.translation: Tämä organisaatio näyttää pyytävän erilaisia tai enemmän tietoja kuin se on ilmoittanut. Lue pyyntö huolellisesti. Voit hylätä pyynnön, jos et halua jakaa tietoja.

onboarding.pin.subtitle.message: This PIN secures your wallet. You enter it every time you open the app or share data.
comments: Explanation of the PIN purpose in onboarding
onboarding.pin.subtitle.translation: Tämä PIN-koodi suojaa lompakkoasi. Syötät sen aina jakaessasi tietoja.

mdlFlow.notAnMdlQr.message: This QR code is not a Myanmar driver license link.
mdlFlow.notAnMdlQr.translation: Tämä QR-koodi ei ole Myanmarin ajokortin linkki.

common.archiveCardDescription.message: This will make {name} unusable and delete it from your wallet.
comments: Description in confirmation dialog explaining card archiving
common.archiveCardDescription.translation: Tämä tekee kortista {name} käyttökelvottoman ja poistaa sen lompakostasi.

pidSetup.enableBiometrics.subtitle.message: To continue, make sure your device has biometric protection enabled, and that Paradym Wallet is allowed to use biometrics.
pidSetup.enableBiometrics.subtitle.translation: Jatkaaksesi varmista, että laitteessasi on biometrinen suojaus käytössä ja että Paradym Wallet saa käyttää biometriikkaa.

txCodeSlide.instructions.message: To receive this card you need to enter a transaction code. This code has been provided to you by the issuer.
comments: Instructions explaining why the user must enter a transaction code
txCodeSlide.instructions.translation: Vastaanottaaksesi tämän kortin sinun tulee syöttää tapahtumakoodi. Myöntäjä on antanut sinulle tämän koodin.

authCodeFlowSlide.description.message: To receive this card, you need to authorize with your account. You will now be redirected to the issuer's website.
comments: Explanation for why user is redirected to external site
authCodeFlowSlide.description.translation: Vastaanottaaksesi tämän kortin sinun tulee krjautua. Sinut ohjataan nyt myöntäjän verkkosivulle.

credentialCardSlide.subtitle.pin.message: To receive this credential from {issuerName}, you need to enter a PIN.
comments: Subtitle shown when entering a PIN is required to receive the credential
credentialCardSlide.subtitle.pin.translation: Vastaanottaaksesi tämän kortin taholta {issuerName} sinun tulee syöttää PIN-koodi.

credentialCardSlide.subtitle.presentatio.message: To receive this credential from {issuerName}, you need to share credentials from your wallet.
comments: Subtitle shown when presentation of other credentials is required
credentialCardSlide.subtitle.presentatio.translation: Vastaanottaaksesi tämän kortin taholta {issuerName} sinun tulee jakaa kortteja lompakostasi.

comments: Heading shown when the user has entered too many incorrect PINs
Label for the input field where the user types the transaction code

documentCatalog.subtitle.message: Turn a physical document into a verified credential in your wallet.
comments: Subtitle of the official-document catalog screen
documentCatalog.subtitle.translation: Muunna fyysinen asiakirja vahvistetuksi todisteeksi lompakossasi.

comments: The United Nations distinguishing sign of an mDL
Shown when fetching an invitation from a URL fails
Heading shown above a list of requested cards the user does not have
Fallback name shown when the verifier/issuer name is missing
Button label for unlocking the ID card using biometrics
Shown when scanned QR code has unsupported URL prefix

onboardingIntro.slide2.subtitle.message: Use the built-in scanner to securely receive official digital documents — like degrees and certificates — directly from universities, employers, and organizations on the ZADA Network.
comments: Subtitle for the scan slide of the intro carousel
onboardingIntro.slide2.subtitle.translation: Käytä sisäänrakennettua skanneria vastaanottaaksesi virallisia digitaalisia asiakirjoja — kuten tutkintotodistuksia ja sertifikaatteja — turvallisesti suoraan yliopistoilta, työnantajilta ja toimijoilta ZADA Networkissa.

qrScanner.instructionHeading.message: Use the camera to scan a QR code
comments: Instruction heading for scanning a QR code

pinSlide.description.message: Use your app PIN code to confirm the request.
comments: Supporting text explaining why PIN is needed

onboardingIntroduction.step2.description.message: Use your ID card PIN to retrieve your identity information.
comments: Description of the second onboarding step about reading identity info
The time ƒrom which a credential is valid
The value of a driving privilege in an mDL
The vehicle category code of an mDL
Badge shown when the credential issuer was cryptographically verified against the ZADA trust registry
Subheading for list of organizations that trust the current one
Primary button to verify phone and email and set up the ZADA ID
Primary action: start credential migration by verifying a phone number
Heading shown when user is about to authenticate

onboarding.setupZadaId.subtitle.message: Verify your phone number and email to unlock your foundational digital identity. If you have used ZADA before, this will also safely transfer your existing credentials to your new wallet.
comments: Subtitle explaining what setting up the ZADA ID does
onboarding.setupZadaId.subtitle.translation: Vahvista puhelinnumerosi ja sähköpostisi ottaaksesi käyttöön digitaalisen perusidentiteettisi. Jos olet käyttänyt ZADAa aiemmin, tämä myös siirtää olemassa olevat todisteesi turvallisesti uuteen lompakkoosi.

mdlFlow.inProgress.message: Verifying your license with the road transport department…
comments: Shown while the license is verified against the RTAD registry and issued
Description text for the attributes button
Heading above the wallet section

pidSetup.idCardVerify.Subtitle.message: We need your biometrics to verify your identity.

comments: Welcome title in wallet screen
Title of the first-launch welcome sheet
Title for second slide of wallet onboarding

onboardingIntro.slide3.subtitle.message: When someone asks for your details, you are in charge. Prove you are over 18 without revealing your exact birthday, and keep your data stored securely on this device — not in the cloud.
comments: Subtitle for the privacy slide of the intro carousel
onboardingIntro.slide3.subtitle.translation: Kun joku pyytää tietojasi, sinä päätät. Todista olevasi yli 18-vuotias paljastamatta tarkkaa syntymäaikaasi, ja pidä tietosi turvallisesti tallessa tällä laitteella — ei pilvessä.

comments: Generic yes/confirm action label
Confirm button text for archiving a card

sharing.failed.missingCredentials.translation: Sinulla ei ollut jakamiseen tarvittavia todisteita.

wallet.emptyTitle.translation: Sinulla ei ole vielä yhtään todistetta

wallet.emptyCredentials.message: You don’t have any credentials yet. Scan a QR code to add your first credential.
wallet.emptyCredentials.translation: Sinulla ei ole vielä yhtään todistetta. Skannaa QR-koodi lisätäksesi ensimmäisen todisteesi.

wallet.emptySubtitle.message: You don’t have any credentials yet. Scan a QR code to add your first credential.
wallet.emptySubtitle.translation: Sinulla ei ole vielä yhtään todistetta. Skannaa QR-koodi lisätäksesi ensimmäisen todisteesi.

inbox.emptyMessage.message: You don't have any notifications at the moment.
comments: Paragraph shown when the inbox is empty
inbox.emptyMessage.translation: Sinulla ei ole tällä hetkellä ilmoituksia.

pinLocked.description.message: You have entered an incorrect PIN. The wallet was locked, please reset it to set a new PIN and continue.
comments: Descriptive text explaining that the wallet is locked and must be reset
pinLocked.description.translation: Olet syöttänyt väärän PIN-koodin. Lompakko lukittiin. Nollaa lompakko asettaaksesi uuden PIN-koodin ja jatkaaksesi.

onboardingSetupZadaId.microcopy.message: You will be securely redirected to your browser to complete verification.
comments: Small text explaining the browser redirect for verification
onboardingSetupZadaId.microcopy.translation: Sinut ohjataan turvallisesti selaimeesi viimeistelemään vahvistus.

onboardingIntroduction.reminder.message: You'll need your eID card to setup the wallet
comments: Reminder shown before user continues onboarding
Heading shown when the inbox is empty
Heading shown when user has no notifications

credentials.cold.offline.message: You’re offline. Connect once to create your offline copy.
credentials.cold.offline.translation: Olet offline-tilassa. Muodosta yhteys kerran luodaksesi offline-kopion.

receiveCredential.deferredCredentialPara.message: Your credentials are not yet ready. We will check once in a while in the background and fetch the credentials once they're ready.
receiveCredential.deferredCredentialPara.translation: Korttisi eivät ole vielä valmiita. Tarkistamme silloin tällöin taustalla ja noudamme kortit, kun ne ovat valmiita.

cardLifecycle.active.sheetDescription.message: Your credentials may expire or require an active internet connection to validate.
cardLifecycle.active.sheetDescription.translation: Todisteesi voivat vanhentua tai vaatia aktiivisen Internet-yhteyden vahvistamiseen.

pidSetup.dataProtection.subtitle.message:
Your data is protected by your PIN and biometrics, and is stored exclusively on this device — not in the cloud.

Note: if you delete this app, your data will be permanently erased. (Optional backup coming soon.)
pidSetup.dataProtection.subtitle.translation: Tietosi on suojattu PIN-koodilla ja biometriikalla. Joka kerta kun jaat tietoja, vahvistamme henkilöllisyytesi.

onboardingWelcome.description.message: Your identity, safely in your pocket. The secure way to hold and share your verified documents.
comments: Intro paragraph on the welcome screen
onboardingWelcome.description.translation: Tämä on digitaalinen lompakkosi. Sen avulla voit tallentaa ja jakaa tietoja itsestäsi.

pidSetup.idCardComplete.subtitle.message: Your information has been retrieved from your eID card.

Shown after credentials are shared (no verifier name)

onboardingIntro.slide1.title.message: Your official IDs, in your pocket
comments: Title for the identity slide of the intro carousel

authenticate.pinRequiredToast.message: Your PIN is required to unlock the app

paradymWallet.about.description.message:
ZADA is a digital identity technology company focused on enabling secure and privacy-preserving access to digital services. Our goal is to help individuals and organizations interact digitally with greater trust, while minimizing fraud and unnecessary data exposure.

With ZADA, users remain in control of their personal data and can choose what information to share, with whom, and for what purpose.

This application is based on open-source software and includes components developed by Animo Solutions and other contributors, licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0. ZADA Network has modified and extended this software as part of its implementation.

Unless otherwise stated, the software is provided “as is,” without warranties or conditions of any kind.

ZADA supports an ecosystem approach to digital identity, enabling trusted and reusable interactions across services.
comments: About screen description text for the Paradym wallet
paradymWallet.about.description.translation: Tämän sovelluksen on luonut Animo Solutions Paradym-kumppanisovellukseksi. Kaikki koodi on saatavilla Apache 2.0 -lisenssillä.
